title: Clean npm installation is not reproducible without a committed lockfile
evidence: docs/audit/2026-06-14/baseline.md#clean-npm-install: npm ci exited 1 with EUSAGE because package-lock.json and npm-shrinkwrap.json are absent; the build used pre-existing node_modules.
reproduction: From a clean checkout, run npm ci.
impact: Dependency resolution cannot be reproduced deterministically in CI or a fresh deployment, and npm run build currently depends on locally prepared dependencies.
recommendation: Commit and maintain the repository's chosen npm lockfile, then make npm ci the documented clean-install path.
verification: In a fresh checkout with no node_modules, npm ci exits 0 and npm run build exits 0 without modifying the lockfile.

title: Isolated Compose project cannot start while the existing app port is in use
evidence: docs/audit/2026-06-14/baseline.md#isolated-compose-startup-attempt: docker compose up -d from the audit worktree exited 1 because full-application-audit-app-1 could not bind 0.0.0.0:8080; docs/audit/2026-06-14/baseline.md#isolated-compose-port-configuration also shows default published ports 8080 and 55433, so concurrent worktrees require explicit port overrides or no host publishing.
reproduction: Keep the existing app stack running, then run docker compose up -d from D:\Automation\SkyPark\App\.worktrees\full-application-audit with default environment values.
impact: Concurrent isolated worktrees cannot start the full stack with default environment values while the primary stack is running.
recommendation: Document per-worktree APP_PORT and FORWARD_DB_PORT overrides, or avoid publishing host ports for isolated worktree stacks.
verification: With the primary stack running, start a second worktree stack using documented non-conflicting APP_PORT and FORWARD_DB_PORT values, or with host publishing disabled, and confirm docker compose ps shows both services running.

title: Laravel Pint reports 78 style violations
evidence: docs/audit/2026-06-14/baseline.md#formatting: vendor/bin/pint --test exited 1 after checking 302 files and reported 78 style issues.
reproduction: Run vendor/bin/pint --test in the application image against the audited commit.
impact: The repository cannot enforce its configured formatter as a passing quality gate, increasing formatting churn and review noise.
recommendation: Apply Pint in a separately reviewed mechanical-formatting change and add the check to CI.
verification: vendor/bin/pint --test exits 0 on the formatted commit and the full automated test suite remains green.

title: Operator users can perform destructive operations (edit/delete) on critical resources
evidence: docs/audit/2026-06-14/security-asvs.md#sc-aud-004: AppServiceProvider lacks policy registrations, and app/Policies is empty.
reproduction: Authenticate as an operator, navigate to /admin/parcare-rezervari, and delete a reservation.
impact: Operator users can delete or alter critical customer, booking, and contract records.
recommendation: Create Eloquent policies for all models and register them.
verification: Operator users get a 403 response on delete or edit actions.

title: Operator users can view and mutate system configuration, templates, and webhook logs
evidence: docs/audit/2026-06-14/security-asvs.md#sc-aud-005: System resources do not define canAccess().
reproduction: Authenticate as an operator, and navigate directly to /admin/sistem-automatizari.
impact: Tampering with webhook logs or outbound message templates is permitted for operators.
recommendation: Implement resource-level canAccess() checks or make these resources read-only.
verification: Operator users are denied access to system configuration routes and pages.

title: No API rate limiting configured on automation and webhook endpoints
evidence: docs/audit/2026-06-14/security-asvs.md#sc-aud-006: routes/api.php does not use throttle middleware.
reproduction: Send multiple rapid API requests to any endpoint.
impact: DoS risk and brute-force vulnerability against API tokens.
recommendation: Apply throttle middleware to the api routes group.
verification: Rapid API requests return 429 Too Many Requests.

title: Operator seeder uses hardcoded passwords in all environments
evidence: docs/audit/2026-06-14/security-asvs.md#sc-aud-007: OperatorUserSeeder.php has a hardcoded default password.
reproduction: Run OperatorUserSeeder in production.
impact: Predictable initial credentials in production.
recommendation: Restrict the seeder to local environments or fetch passwords from environment variables.
verification: Seeder throws an exception in production if environment variables are not set.

title: Multi-step writes and import loops are executed without database transactions
evidence: docs/audit/2026-06-14/data-integrity.md#sc-aud-008: Loop imports and webhook actions lack transactional wrapping.
reproduction: Simulate database failure on PDF import loop or Telegram save step.
impact: Partial updates, orphan records, and inconsistent data states on failure.
recommendation: Wrap multi-step writes in DB::transaction blocks.
verification: Simulated failure rolls back all database changes successfully.

title: Payment change audits and parking reservation status audits are never automatically generated
evidence: docs/audit/2026-06-14/data-integrity.md#sc-aud-009: Audit tables exist but are never written by model events or observers.
reproduction: Update a reservation status or payment, and check the audit tables.
impact: Changes to critical financial and reservation data are not tracked or audited.
recommendation: Register observers or boot events to automatically log status and payment changes.
verification: Auditing tables record a new row automatically after saving or modifying records.

title: Lodging rooms and vehicles can be double-booked for overlapping periods
evidence: docs/audit/2026-06-14/data-integrity.md#sc-aud-010: Lodging reservation and rental contract schemas lack overlap checks.
reproduction: Create two reservations for Room A or Contract for Vehicle B on overlapping dates.
impact: Double-booking leads to client disputes, room availability errors, and manual overrides.
recommendation: Add check validations or form constraints to prevent overlapping reservations.
verification: Forms fail validation and block saving on date-range availability conflicts.

title: Handlers do not lock database rows, allowing duplicate records under concurrent requests
evidence: docs/audit/2026-06-14/data-integrity.md#sc-aud-011: Handlers lack pessimistic lockForUpdate() checks.
reproduction: Send concurrent duplicate requests to Telegram webhook or outboundcallback controller.
impact: Duplicate budget transactions and event logs are created under race conditions.
recommendation: Use pessimistic database locks (lockForUpdate) on session queries and transaction creation.
verification: Only a single transaction or event is created, and the concurrent thread is rejected or handled as a no-op.

title: Normalized plate is not populated when parking reservations are created via webhook
evidence: docs/audit/2026-06-14/workflows-parking-lodging.md#sc-aud-012: webhook handler does not compute or set normalized_plate.
reproduction: Send a parking reservation webhook and check normalized_plate in the database.
impact: Database queries relying on normalized_plate will miss webhook-created records.
recommendation: Populate normalized_plate during webhook upserts.
verification: normalized_plate is successfully saved with normalized value on webhook creation.

title: Reservation status fields in Filament resources are free-form text inputs
evidence: docs/audit/2026-06-14/workflows-parking-lodging.md#sc-aud-013: status field is a TextInput in reservation forms.
reproduction: Type any invalid text string into the status field of a reservation in Filament and save.
impact: Inconsistent data states, typos in statuses prevent observers and review scripts from executing.
recommendation: Replace TextInput fields with Select dropdowns referencing defined status enums/options.
verification: Status fields are select dropdowns and restrict save to valid options only.

title: Rental contracts and maintenance records permit overlapping vehicle allocations
evidence: docs/audit/2026-06-14/workflows-rental-finance.md#sc-aud-014: RentContract and RentMaintenance schemas lack date overlap validations.
reproduction: Create two overlapping contracts or maintenance records for Vehicle A in Filament.
impact: Double-allocation of vehicles, contract codes conflicts, and scheduling clashes.
recommendation: Implement form validations checking for overlapping active bookings or maintenance windows.
verification: Filament form blocks saving and throws an error on overlapping rental periods.

title: Telegram bot finalizes transactions without database transaction wrapping
evidence: docs/audit/2026-06-14/workflows-rental-finance.md#sc-aud-015: ProcessIncome/ProcessExpense Telegram actions write messages and transactions separately.
reproduction: Simulate database constraint error during transaction save on the final bot step.
impact: Orphaned raw messages saved in the database without linked budget transactions.
recommendation: Wrap Telegram raw message log and budget transaction creation in a DB::transaction block.
verification: Database changes are cleanly rolled back if saving a transaction fails.

title: Upload action on Ordinea de Zi page lacks file size limits
evidence: docs/audit/2026-06-14/workflows-scheduling-messaging-marketing.md#sc-aud-016: schedule_pdf FileUpload field has no maxSize constraint.
reproduction: Upload a massive PDF file (e.g. 50MB) to the schedule import form in Filament.
impact: Risk of server memory exhaustion and denial-of-service (DoS) during parsing.
recommendation: Add a size limit constraint (e.g. ->maxSize(5120)) to the FileUpload form field.
verification: Filament blocks uploading files larger than the specified size limit.

title: Unresolved placeholders in message templates are sent raw to customers
evidence: docs/audit/2026-06-14/workflows-scheduling-messaging-marketing.md#sc-aud-017: RenderMessageTemplate has no checks for unresolved placeholders.
reproduction: Trigger a message dispatch where a placeholder is omitted in the data payload.
impact: Literal placeholder strings (e.g. {{name}}) are sent in notifications, looking unprofessional.
recommendation: Validate that all placeholders are replaced, or strip unresolved variables before queueing.
verification: Messages are queued with unresolved placeholders removed or flagged.

title: The Marketing domain contains no active business workflows (CRUD only)
evidence: docs/audit/2026-06-14/workflows-scheduling-messaging-marketing.md#sc-aud-018: Marketing resources lack observers, commands, or integration actions.
reproduction: Verify that creating a campaign or ad spend log has no automated side effects or external links.
impact: Operational misalignment. Staff may expect automatic ad cost synchronization or campaign dispatch.
recommendation: Document clearly that the marketing domain is storage-only, or design integrations in future phases.
verification: The README or operations document notes that marketing is CRUD-only.

title: Lack of concurrency and race condition test coverage
evidence: docs/audit/2026-06-14/test-traceability.md#sc-aud-019
reproduction: Execute webhook handlers or Telegram sessions in parallel.
impact: Undetected race conditions and concurrency conflicts on resources.
recommendation: Implement concurrency tests using multi-threading or lock checks.
verification: Concurrency tests exit 0.

title: Missing negative path validation tests for API Webhooks
evidence: docs/audit/2026-06-14/test-traceability.md#sc-aud-020
reproduction: Send malformed or extreme payloads to API endpoints.
impact: Risk of unhandled crashes, SQL errors, or validation bypasses in production.
recommendation: Add test cases validating response behaviors for malformed inputs.
verification: Negative path tests exit 0.

title: Missing automated tests for auto-generated audit logs
evidence: docs/audit/2026-06-14/test-traceability.md#sc-aud-021
reproduction: Mutate reservation statuses and observe audit table results.
impact: Status updates lack automated audit-trail guarantees.
recommendation: Write tests verifying automated audit-trail generation upon model saves.
verification: Audit-trail creation tests pass automatically.

title: Absence of validation failure testing for PDF scheduler parser
evidence: docs/audit/2026-06-14/test-traceability.md#sc-aud-022
reproduction: Upload invalid or corrupted PDF schedules to the scheduler action.
impact: Failed parses can result in partially imported schedules and database corruption without warning.
recommendation: Add test assertions checking scheduler's handling of invalid schedules.
verification: Invalid PDF tests fail gracefully with rollback verification.

title: Missing automated queue worker daemon
evidence: docs/audit/2026-06-14/operations.md#sc-aud-023
reproduction: Queue a job and observe that it remains in the jobs table without executing.
impact: Queued jobs (e.g. email and SMS notifications) are never executed unless run manually.
recommendation: Add a queue worker service container to docker-compose.yml.
verification: Queued jobs execute automatically.

title: CLI server php artisan serve used for application delivery
evidence: docs/audit/2026-06-14/operations.md#sc-aud-024
reproduction: Inspect Dockerfile web server CMD.
impact: Bottlenecks and crashes under concurrent load in production.
recommendation: Transition to FrankenPHP, Swoole, RoadRunner, or Nginx + PHP-FPM.
verification: Production server is stable under concurrent load test.

title: Missing scheduled task runner
evidence: docs/audit/2026-06-14/operations.md#sc-aud-025
reproduction: Verify lack of schedule runner in docker-compose.yml.
impact: Scheduled tasks will not trigger automatically.
recommendation: Add a cron daemon or scheduler container executing php artisan schedule:run.
verification: Scheduled tasks trigger at their defined cron interval.

title: Log retention is configured to grow infinitely
evidence: docs/audit/2026-06-14/operations.md#sc-aud-026
reproduction: Inspect config/logging.php default stacked single log path.
impact: Disk exhaustion over time due to unbounded laravel.log file size.
recommendation: Configure daily log rotation or external log shipper.
verification: Logs rotate daily and old logs are automatically pruned.

title: No automated DB backup pipeline
evidence: docs/audit/2026-06-14/operations.md#sc-aud-027
reproduction: Verify lack of backup schedule or script.
impact: Potential permanent data loss in event of docker volume corruption or server failure.
recommendation: Implement automated database backup task uploaded to secure offsite storage.
verification: Backup file is successfully generated and verified daily.
